refund.missing_tid: Cannot process refund: transaction number (tno) is missing.

payment_error.title: Payment Error
payment_error.message: An error occurred while processing the payment.

user.vbank_notice: Your order will be automatically cancelled if payment is not received by the deadline.

admin.test_mode_order_notice: This order was processed as a test payment.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_title: Warning: NHN KCP payments are currently set to test mode.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_body: Test payments do not create real payments. If the shop is live, switch this plugin to live payment mode before operating.
admin.order_info_description: Displays stored KCP original approval and current payment status.
admin.escrow_delivery_description: Register the tracking number with KCP after shipping.

settings.title: NHN KCP Settings
settings.description: Manage NHN KCP payment plugin settings.
settings.test_mode_hint: No real payments occur in test mode.
settings.live_mode_warning_body: Real payments will occur. Verify that your live site code and key are configured correctly.
settings.cancel_server_ip_title: Payment cancellation server IP registration required
settings.cancel_server_ip_body: NHN KCP allows live payment cancellations from the shop admin only when the shop server's outbound IP is registered in the KCP merchant admin.
settings.cancel_server_ip_path: NHN KCP Merchant Admin > Technology Management Center > Security Management > Server IP Settings (Payment)
settings.cancel_server_ip_effect: If the IP is not registered or the server IP changes, cancellation from this admin screen may fail and you may need to cancel directly in the KCP merchant admin.
settings.test_site_cd_hint: Test site code issued by KCP (default: T0000)
settings.test_site_key_hint: Test site key issued by KCP
settings.live_site_cd_hint: Live site code issued by KCP (enter without SR prefix)
settings.live_site_cd_example: e.g.: xxxxxx → full site_cd used will be SRxxxxxx
settings.section_easy_pay_hint: Select the easy payment services to enable. Only activate services for which you have completed a KCP merchant agreement.
settings.easy_pay_allow_with_other_pg_hint: When enabled, NHN KCP easy pay buttons will appear on the checkout page even when another PG is set as the default payment method.
settings.easy_pay_naverpay_point_hint: Requires a NaverPay Point payment agreement with KCP. If you see error [DR02], disable this option and contact KCP.
settings.redirect_success_url_hint: Supports relative paths or full URLs. {orderId} will be replaced with the actual order number.
settings.redirect_fail_url_hint: Supports relative paths or full URLs. Error details are appended as query parameters.
settings.vbank_expire_days_hint: Number of days the virtual account remains valid for deposit (1–7 days).
settings.vbank_notify_hint: Register this URL as the deposit notification URL in the NHN KCP merchant admin to enable automatic virtual account payment processing.
settings.vbank_notify_path: Registration path: NHN KCP Merchant Admin > Technology Management Center > Webhook Management > Webhook URL Settings
settings.section_escrow_hint: With escrow, payment is held until the buyer confirms receipt.
settings.use_escrow_hint: When enabled, escrow applies to all payments.
settings.escrow_common_notify_hint: Register this URL as the common notification URL in the NHN KCP merchant admin to enable automatic escrow purchase confirmation/cancellation processing.
